action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess.py fully succeeded with sequential processor application + language merge after Pi0NewLineProcessor/TokenizerProcessorStep (preserves 'observation' key, PIL 224x224 images under exact PI0 view names base/left/right_wrist, padded 32D state/action, complementary_data+task, dummy_action). All 6 steps (Rename, AddBatchDim, Pi0NewLine, Tokenizer, Device, Normalizer) complete without ObservationProcessorStep error. test_obs.py reaches mock success=1.0 but predict.py truncation at _prepare_observation causes TypeError NoneType subscriptable + fallback zero-action (real evals all 0.0 over 22 iters). RecordingEvaluator, PI0 load, processors list, _action_to_ee delta bridge, and chunking pattern are solid. Analysis: Exact working batch+sequential+merge pattern from diagnostic resolves the training-oriented pipeline mutation issue (Language/NewLine steps return partial dict; explicit merge of tokens/attention_mask/language while preserving full observation/images/state satisfies all downstream steps). Full non-truncated predict.py copying this pattern into _safe_preprocess + _prepare_observation (map rgb[0,2,3] to base/left/right_wrist as PIL, state pad to 32, dummy_action=32D, deepcopy+merge), policy.predict_action_chunk+postprocess+pending queue (amortizes expensive forward), tuned ee-delta bridge (pos*0.05/euler*0.25/grip>0.5->1/-1), complete main() parsing eval_config.json+track_path, and full RecordingEvaluator (super init + evaluate_single_episode per contract) will produce real policy actions without error/fallback. Matches intended Pi0 track (LIBERO-pretrained on similar pick/place tasks should yield >0 success on add_condiment/select_* once end-to-end; first non-zero baseline). Decision: Overwrite predict.py with COMPLETE clean non-truncated implementation (exact diagnostic pattern + full methods + error recovery only on true exceptions, improved view mapping rgb[0]=base/rgb[2]=left/rgb[3]=right, chunking, no syntax issues). Keep test files. Run python test_preprocess.py && python test_obs.py for validation (expect FULL SEQUENTIAL PREPROCESS SUCCEEDED + real policy actions in mock without fallback/image-missing error). Then submit_eval on base checkpoint for first non-zero success_rate measurement before LoRA/training.
